/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/sample_cublasLt_LtNvfp4Matmul.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/sample_cublasLt_LtNvfp4Matmul.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sample_cublasLt_LtNvfp4Matmul.dir/sample_cublasLt_LtNvfp4Matmul.cu.o -o sample_cublasLt_LtNvfp4Matmul   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/sbsa-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/sbsa-linux/lib  -lcudart -lcublasLt -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
